name.es: Couronne bordelaise (corona de pan de Burdeos)

description.en: A ring of nine joined dough balls around a central disc, its flaps cut and folded like flower petals. Built from a levain-and-yeast country dough with a touch of whole wheat, it's Bordeaux's striking answer to pain de campagne.
description.de: Ein Ring aus neun aneinandergefügten Teigkugeln um eine mittlere Scheibe, deren Zipfel wie Blütenblätter eingeschnitten und gefaltet werden. Aus einem Sauerteig-Hefe-Landbrotteig mit etwas Vollkornmehl gebaut, ist es Bordeaux' auffällige Antwort auf den Pain de Campagne.
description.es: Un anillo de nueve bolas de masa unidas alrededor de un disco central, con sus solapas cortadas y plegadas como pétalos de flor. Hecha con una masa de campo con levain y levadura y un toque de trigo integral, es la llamativa respuesta de Burdeos al pain de campagne.
description.fr: Une couronne de neuf boules de pâte soudées autour d'un disque central, aux pointes incisées et rabattues comme des pétales. Pâte de campagne au levain et à la levure, relevée d'un peu de blé complet : la réponse spectaculaire de Bordeaux au pain de campagne.

origin.note: Traditionally shaped from 8 or 9 balls with a small rosette on top; made with only 6 balls, the same shape is called a couronne gasconne.

method.title: Mix
method.summary: Combine water, salt and levain, then work in the two flours and yeast to a smooth dough; knead well.

method.title: Divide
method.summary: Divide into nine even balls plus one larger ball for the center.

method.title: Shape the crown
method.summary: Flatten the large ball into a disc for the middle and arrange the nine balls in a ring around it.

method.title: Cut and fold
method.summary: Snip radial cuts between the balls and fold each flap over its neighbor to lock the ring together.

method.title: Proof and bake
method.summary: Proof until puffy, then bake hot with steam until deeply golden.

source.adaptation: Levain's own flour/water content estimated (assumed 100%-hydration liquid levain) and folded into total baker's percentages.
